title: How to customize Ubuntu 20.04.2 LTS Focal Fossa like mac os

title: Sublime text for full stack web development
detail: Sublime text is a simple text editor but not easy to setup for  what you want and here is how to setup sublime for reactjs⚛️, python🐍, html, css, javascript and typescript. This include formatting as well.
